notes: UI steps for batch export mutations. GQL payloads use format CSV; customer/user scope comes from Bearer JWT unless noted.

steps: Go to Manage → Users & teams.
Open the Users tab (Active users).
Optionally apply a filter (e.g. Active status) so the toolbar shows Export filtered data.
Click Export filtered data (or Export all data when no filters are applied).
exportUsers.web_gap: UI may download CSV client-side today; capture ExportUsers GraphQL when the async export is wired.

steps: Go to Manage → Users & teams.
Open the Teams tab.
Click Export all data (or Export filtered data when filters are applied).
Go to Manage → Users & teams.
Open the Roles tab.
Click Export all data (Unassigned roles view uses the same export control when filtered).
Go to Manage → Users & teams.
Open the Servers tab.
Click Export data.
Go to Manage → Users & teams.
Open the SSO tab.
Click Export all data when enabled (currently may be disabled in UI — use GQL trigger if WEB GAP).
exportSsoMappings.web_gap: SSO export button may be disabled; fire exportSsoMappings via GraphQL generate if UI stub.

steps: Go to Manage → Tags.
Stay on All tags (or Unused tags tab).
Click Export all data.
Go to Manage → Company assets → Company Library.
Click Export All Data in the action bar.
Open My Library.
On the Assets tab (or Webkits tab), click Export All Data.
Go to Manage → Imported fonts.
Open the Fonts tab.
Click Export list.
exportImportedFonts.web_gap: UI may call exportFontTemplate (sync CSV) instead of exportImportedFonts batch mutation.

steps: Go to Discover fonts → Leaving soon.
Click Export all data and confirm in the modal.
exportLeavingSoonFonts.web_gap: Confirm modal may not call mutation yet — capture exportLeavingSoonFonts from GQL generate if WEB GAP.

steps: Go to Manage → Usage activity.
Open the Fonts tab.
Click Export in the toolbar and confirm.
exportReportingFonts.web_gap: Export confirm modal may be a stub — use GQL generate when UI does not fire mutation.

steps: Go to Manage → Usage activity.
Open the Users tab.
Click Export in the toolbar and confirm.
exportReportingUsers.web_gap: Export confirm modal may be a stub — use GQL generate when UI does not fire mutation.

steps: Go to Manage → Usage activity.
Open the Webkits tab.
Click Export in the toolbar and confirm.
exportReportingWebkits.web_gap: Export confirm modal may be a stub — use GQL generate when UI does not fire mutation.

steps: Go to Manage → Usage activity → Fonts tab.
Open a font usage drawer.
On the Assets tab, click Export data.
exportFontAssets.web_gap: Drawer export may be un wired — use GQL generate with fontId from drawer context.

steps: Go to Manage → Usage activity → Fonts tab.
Open a font usage drawer.
On the Projects tab, click Export data.
exportFontProjects.web_gap: Drawer export may be un wired — use GQL generate with fontId from drawer context.

steps: Go to Manage → Usage activity → Fonts tab.
Open a font usage drawer.
On the Users tab, click Export data.
exportFontUsers.web_gap: Drawer export may be un wired — use GQL generate with fontId from drawer context.

steps: Go to Manage → Usage activity → Fonts tab.
Open a font usage drawer.
On the Webkits tab, click Export data.
exportFontWebkits.web_gap: Drawer export may be un wired — use GQL generate with fontId from drawer context.

steps: Go to Manage → Usage activity → Users tab.
Open a user usage drawer.
On the Assets tab, click Export data.
exportUserAssets.web_gap: Drawer export may be un wired — use GQL generate with subjectUserId from drawer.

steps: Go to Manage → Usage activity → Users tab.
Open a user usage drawer.
On the Fonts tab, click Export data.
exportUserFonts.web_gap: Drawer export may be un wired — use GQL generate with subjectUserId from drawer.

steps: Go to Manage → Usage activity → Users tab.
Open a user usage drawer.
On the Projects tab, click Export data.
exportUserProjects.web_gap: Drawer export may be un wired — use GQL generate with subjectUserId from drawer.

steps: Go to Manage → Usage activity → Webkits tab.
Open Domains served (or webkit usage drawer).
Click Export data.
exportWebkitDomains.web_gap: May only log analytics today — use GQL generate with webkitId.

steps: Go to Manage → Usage activity → Webkits tab.
Open a webkit usage drawer.
On the Fonts tab, click Export data.
exportWebkitFonts.web_gap: Drawer export may be un wired — use GQL generate with webkitId.

steps: Open Notifications inbox.
Use export control if present; otherwise trigger exportNotifications via GraphQL generate (no UI yet).
exportNotifications.web_gap: No export UI in notifications inbox — GQL-only until UI ships.
